prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-GARDENTOOLS-3PC-BUN Product Type: GARDEN_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Wooden Steel Handheld Garden Tools Set Rake Shovel Hoe 3 Pieces Description: The 3pc set of ToolTreaux gardening tools is a great addition to your arsenal of gardening tools and gardening accessories. The set comes with 3 common handheld gardening tools: a shovel, a rake, and a hoe.

Use the rake for:
-Removing unwanted garden debris
-Weeding large sections of soil
-Leveling and grading soil before planting
-Aerating soil so plants can receive the essential nutrients they need to grow
-Working in soil supplements or compost materials to ensure even distribution

Use the hoe for:
-Weeding or chopping large sections of soil to disturb the soil surface
-Breaking up large areas of soil ahead before springtime planting
-Aerating soil so plants can receive the essential nutrients they need to grow
-Constructing narrow furrows or shallow trenches for planting seeds, bulbs, flowers, plants, succulents, and more
-Removing clods of soil in a garden bed, plant pot, or flower pot

Use the shovel for:
-Digging soil for new plants, flowers, or succulents
-Aerating soil to allow essential nutrients to reach plants roots for optimal growth
-Transplanting flowers, herbs, or succulents to a different area in your garden or if planting a new flower pot, plant pot or succulent planter
-Moving or transferring small amounts of soil, compost materials, or fertilizer
-Cutting into hardened soil, clay, or tough roots

Featuring wooden handles and a comfortable soft foam grip wrap, all of these gardening tools are easy to handle, durable, and will last you through many gardening seasons to come. For longevity sake, rinse and dry the garden tools when you are done gardening or weeding and store them in a dry place. Search Terms: rake garden tools rakes leaf rake landscaping tools gardening tools hand tools for gardening for women kids weeding heavy duty steel cute planting tools supplies equipment seeds pots augers Features: - 3PC GARDENING TOOLS SET: This set of 3 handheld gardening tools comes with 3 essential tools used to remove garden debris, as well as to level and grade your garden soil before plants or seeds are planted in your garden, herb garden, flowerpot, plant pot, or succulent planter. Included are a shovel, rake and hoe. - VERSATILE PLANTING ESSENTIALS: Each set comes with a variety of common gardening tools designed to help you dig, plant, and cultivate seeds. Use the hoe for weeding and chopping soil, the rake for leveling and grading, and the shovel for digging and aerating. - ERGONOMIC HANDLE: All 3 of these gardening tools feature a comfortable, ergonomic grip handle surrounded by a soft foam wrap grip to give your hand and inner palm protection when gardening or planting. - QUALITY MATERIALS: Featuring wooden handles and a steelhead construction, these garden tools are durable and will last you through many gardening seasons to come; for longevity, rinse and dry the garden cultivator tools when you are done and store them in a dry place - SPECIFICATIONS: Country of Origin: China; Materials: wood handle, soft foam grip wrap, metal tool head; Shovel length: 14"; Rake length: 12"; Hoe length: 11"; Comes with 3 pieces === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 3-Piece Wooden Steel Garden Tools Set Rake Shovel Hoe

tokens.name: Wooden Steel Garden Tools Set Rake Shovel Hoe

anthropic.title_differentiation: Ergonomic Foam Grip, Heavy Duty Steel Head, Wooden Handle, Digging Weeding Planting

openai.title_differentiation: 3-Piece Set, Wooden Handles, Steel Heads, Soft Foam Grip, Shovel Rake And Hoe, Digging Weeding Planting Tools
